887 MBLTY_CANE_CD MBLTY_CANE_CD GG0120A Mobility Device - Cane/Crutch CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident used a cane or crutches in the last seven days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
888 MBLTY_WLKR_CD MBLTY_WLKR_CD GG0120B Mobility Device - Walker CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident used a walker in the last seven days.
